overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of Night City's downtown district at night. The player walks through rain-slicked streets illuminated by vibrant holographic advertisements and neon signage, passing pedestrians and futuristic architecture with ray-traced reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with holographic advertisement towers

events.description: turning left to face the central plaza with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza observing the holographic advertisements and neon signs

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure displaying rotating holographic advertisements
large vertical billboard with red demon face and Japanese text
blue neon sign with DYNAMITE text
rain-slicked ground reflecting neon lights and holograms
yellow textured ground tiles marking pedestrian pathways

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, surrounded by towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage. The ground is wet and highly reflective, mirroring the vibrant pink, blue, and yellow lights. The player turns left to face the central plaza area, walking slowly across the yellow tactile paving while observing the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk lined with palm trees and vertical neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and mask walking toward the camera
pedestrian with purple scarf walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk between the street and buildings
tall vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements
futuristic street lamps illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the open plaza onto a city sidewalk flanked by palm trees and towering buildings covered in vertical neon billboards. The street is moderately busy with pedestrians walking in opposing directions. The architecture features modern glass facades with Japanese signage, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the colorful neon lights from the surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath building overpass with large warning signage

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the building overpass with yellow warning signs

agents.ego_description: walking under the building overpass toward the convenience store entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow warning signs with black text reading WARNING and DOWN RANGE
concrete overpass structure creating a covered walkway
futuristic convenience store with blue neon 24/7 signage and glass entrance

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive building overpass dominated by large yellow WARNING signs. The area is more enclosed with less sky visible, and the lighting shifts to artificial sources under the overpass. A futuristic 24/7 convenience store with cyan neon lighting becomes visible ahead, marking the destination of the walk.

scene_state.functional_zone: storefront entrance with magazine display rack

events.description: slowing down and stopping to examine the magazine rack outside the store

agents.ego_description: stopping to examine the magazine rack displaying colorful publications outside the convenience store

entered.detail: metal rack displaying colorful magazines and publications with anime-style covers

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the storefront area where the player approaches a magazine rack displaying colorful publications with anime-style cover art. The camera moves closer to examine the magazines in detail, ending with a close-up view of the rack. The convenience store's cyan neon lighting illuminates the immediate area while the warning signs fade from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-drenched urban plaza into the intimate confines of a futuristic convenience store. It begins by gliding across wet, reflective tactile paving in a vast open square surrounded by towering holographic advertisements in vibrant pinks and blues. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts onto a bustling sidewalk lined with palm trees and glass facades featuring Japanese signage, where the open sky begins to narrow. The perspective then transitions beneath a massive building overpass, moving from the open street into a semi-covered walkway dominated by artificial light and large yellow warning signs. Finally, the camera approaches a cyan-lit storefront, narrowing its focus from the cityscape to a close-up examination of a magazine rack filled with colorful anime-style publications.
